gherkin:
When I click on the "Overrides" menu item in the left navigation
And I click the "Create Override" button
Then I should see the Overrides page with a list of existing overrides
And I should see a "Create Override" button at the top of the page
And I should see the "Create Override" dialog box open
And I should see an "Okta ID" text input field
And I should see a "Client Type" dropdown with "ALL_CLIENTS" selected by default
And I should see a "Features" dropdown with "Select features..." placeholder
When I enter "abc123" in the Okta ID field
And I click on the Client Type dropdown
And Test Data:
* Okta ID: abc123
* Client Type: PLAYSTATION
* Features: MLB_AUDIO
Then I should see a list of client types including "PLAYSTATION", "ROKU", "IOS", "ANDROID_MOBILE", etc.
When I select "PLAYSTATION" from the Client Type dropdown
And I click on the Features dropdown
Then I should see feature options including "MLB_AUDIO", "AUDIO_ADS_DISABLED", "VIDEO_ADS_DISABLED"
When I select "MLB_AUDIO" from the Features options
And I click the "Save" button
Then the "Create Override" dialog should close
And I should return to the Overrides page
When I search for "abc123" in the search field
Then I should see 1 search result showing:
* Okta ID: "abc123"
* Client Type: "PLAYSTATION"
* Features: 1 feature chip displayed
